metadata.description: Microsoft Sentinel scheduled analytic rules for the Euno capability-native agent governance pilot. Implements the detections called out in Sprint 3-5 of the execution plan: denied-action spikes, write attempts under read-only mode, repeated invalid tokens, and kill-switch activation.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace onboarded to Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.displayName: Euno - Capability denial spike from a single agent/session
properties.description: Five or more capability-token denials within five minutes from the same agent or session. Possible prompt-injection attempt or runaway agent loop.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'Capability check failed' or LogMessage has 'AUTHORIZATION_FAILED' or LogMessage has 'INVALID_TOKEN'
| extend payload = parse_json(LogMessage)
| extend agentId = tostring(payload.agentId), sessionId = tostring(payload.sessionId)
| where isnotempty(sessionId) or isnotempty(agentId)
| summarize Denials = count() by sessionId, agentId, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Denials >= 5

properties.displayName: Euno - Write attempt from a read-only session
properties.description: An agent session that was issued only read scopes attempted a write operation. Indicates either a buggy agent or an active jailbreak attempt.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'AUTHORIZATION_FAILED'
| extend payload = parse_json(LogMessage)
| extend action = tostring(payload.action), sessionId = tostring(payload.sessionId), grantedScopes = tostring(payload.grantedScopes)
| where action in ('write','delete','update','create') and grantedScopes !contains 'write' and grantedScopes !contains 'delete'
| project TimeGenerated, sessionId, action, grantedScopes, _ResourceId

properties.displayName: Euno - Burst of invalid capability tokens
properties.description: More than 20 invalid-signature or expired-token errors in a 5-minute window. Possible token-forgery attempt or a clock-skew incident in the fleet.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'INVALID_TOKEN' or LogMessage has 'EXPIRED_TOKEN' or LogMessage has 'invalid signature'
| summarize InvalidTokens = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), _ResourceId
| where InvalidTokens > 20

properties.description: Operational event: an admin activated the global, session-scoped, or agent-scoped kill switch. Forwarded as an incident so the on-call channel always sees a record.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'Kill switch activated' or LogMessage has 'KILL_ALL_AGENTS' or LogMessage has 'kill switch enabled'
| project TimeGenerated, _ResourceId, LogMessage

properties.description: More than 10 token revocations through the admin API within 5 minutes. Could indicate an automated incident-response action or an attacker abusing operator credentials.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'Token revoked via admin API'
| summarize Revocations = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Revocations > 10
